title: Kael Vorthane — Character Concept
caption: Official character concept art for Kael Vorthane, Shadow Operative. Featuring his signature dark armor and dual-blade configuration.

comments.author: ArtFan42
comments.text: The shadow effects on the armor are incredible!

replies.author: Author
replies.text: Thank you! I used a layered transparency technique for that.

comments.author: SciFiLover
comments.text: Reminds me of Ghost in the Shell aesthetics. Love it.

title: Iron Citadel — Exterior View
caption: Panoramic view of the Iron Citadel at sunset, showing the Spire of Echoes and the surrounding crystal-reinforced walls.

comments.author: WorldBuilder
comments.text: The scale of this is breathtaking. How large is it supposed to be?

replies.author: Author
replies.text: The Citadel spans roughly 12km in diameter. The Spire itself is about 800m tall.

title: Gemora World Overview — Teaser
caption: A brief teaser showcasing the world of Gemora, its landscapes, and the civilizations that inhabit it.

comments.author: GemoraFan
comments.text: Can't wait for the full series! The worldbuilding is top-tier.

title: Elynra Moonveil — Director Portrait
caption: Official portrait of Director Elynra Moonveil in her ceremonial Jewerlian robes, with the Morneven Institute emblem visible.

title: Ashford Repeater — Weapon Design
caption: Technical illustration of the Ashford Repeater energy weapon, showing internal Worldshard crystal mechanism.

title: Character Turnaround — Rex Ashford
caption: 360-degree character turnaround animation for Rex Ashford, Lead Engineer.

title: Verdant Hollows — Night Scene
caption: The bioluminescent trees of Verdant Hollows glowing under Gemora's twin moons.

title: Nexus Drive — Core Assembly
caption: Close-up render of the Nexus Drive's core crystal array during activation sequence.
